title: arthroceras subterminale
side_effects: Arthroceras subterminale can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use can also lead to allergic reactions, resulting in skin rashes, itching, and respiratory problems. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can cause cardiovascular issues, including rapid heartbeat and decreased blood pressure. Furthermore, improper use of Arthroceras subterminale can also interfere with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
